goal: Final qualification of the microstructure route into one of three honest statuses: confirmed true overlay, confirmed replacement layer, or watchlist/reject against immutable base active-signal-v1@1.
global_constraints: Never modify the immutable base snapshot active-signal-v1@1.
All key comparisons must use active-signal-v1@1 as the sole decision reference; @3 is auxiliary only.
Overlay and replacement tracks must never be mixed in the same narrative or run.
Every threshold must have documented provenance: quantile rule or selection-OOS search with frozen lockbox. No hand-tuned magic numbers.
All comparisons must be same-window: base @1, variant, and combined run on identical time windows.
Simple rules (bucket, threshold, quantile) must be evaluated before any model-based approach.
Short-only, long-only, and combined side splits must all be evaluated independently.
Old routes (IV, breadth, path-asymmetry, regime-disagreement, directional classification on old universe) are closed and must not be reopened.
No new data families or macro universe until microstructure qualification is complete.

stages.title: Freeze terminology and correction log
stages.objective: Establish a clean v12 research project with corrected terminology, immutable reference lock, and structured open-items register so that overlay and replacement are never confused again.
actions: Open a new research_project for v12.
Record correction in research_record: v11 downgraded to watchlist, v10 mischaracterized as model-based veto overlay (actually rule-based replacement candidate).
Lock immutable reference: snapshot_id=active-signal-v1, version=1, symbol=BTCUSDT, anchor=1h, execution=5m.
Create research_map axes: track, side, route_type, threshold_origin, comparison_window, final_decision.

Create open-items register covering: true_overlay_track, replacement_track, threshold_provenance, same_window_ref1_runs, short_long_combined_split, cannibalization_audit, model_need_assessment, final_v12_verdict.
success_criteria: Clean v12 project exists with corrected terminology and locked baseline reference.
Research map axes created and open-items register populated.

stages.title: Rebuild exact base @1 comparison frame
stages.objective: Produce one canonical lockbox reference run of the immutable base snapshot @1 with full trade-level detail, serving as the sole comparison baseline for all v12 work.
actions: Load exact base snapshot active-signal-v1@1.
Identify and fix the exact lockbox window used in v10/v11.
Run immutable base @1 on that lockbox window as a standalone backtest.
Extract and persist: trades list, timestamps, side split, PnL, profit factor, drawdown, win rate.
Save this as the single canonical base_ref1_lockbox_run for v12.
success_criteria: One canonical base_ref1_lockbox_run exists with complete trade-level metrics.

stages.title: Threshold provenance and selection discipline
stages.objective: Replace hand-tuned thresholds with a principled selection procedure, producing up to 3 frozen threshold sets with documented provenance before any lockbox rerun.
actions: Define candidate threshold families for cf_micro_imbalance_1h: quantile-based, fixed numeric, symmetric, asymmetric.
Split data into threshold selection window and lockbox verification window.
On selection window, choose at most 3 candidate threshold sets: conservative, balanced, aggressive.
Freeze all threshold sets before any lockbox rerun.
Document provenance of every threshold in research_record.
success_criteria: Frozen threshold sets with documented provenance exist.
No threshold lacks an explainable origin.

stages.title: Build true overlay implementation over @1
stages.objective: Construct true overlay variants where microstructure acts only as a causal allow/block gate on top of the base @1 signals, preserving signal IDs and entry timing with zero retroactive replacement.
actions: Build true overlay variant: base signal IDs and entry logic preserved, microstructure applied only as allow/block gate at decision moment.
Create separate snapshots for short-only overlay, long-only overlay, and combined overlay.
Validate at snapshot assembly level: signal IDs base preserved, entry timing preserved, trade blocked only at decision moment, no retroactive replacement.
Save three separate overlay snapshots.
success_criteria: Three honest true-overlay snapshots exist with causal blocking verified and no replacement logic.

stages.title: Simple-rule overlay tests on selection window
stages.objective: Run true overlay variants on the selection window across all threshold sets and side modes to determine whether overlay has any signal before committing to lockbox runs.
actions: For each frozen threshold set, run on selection window: short-only, long-only, and combined true overlay.
Compute per variant: delta PnL vs base, delta PF, delta DD, removed trades, removed winners, removed losers, veto precision.
Apply promotion rule: advance only variants with meaningful delta that do not collapse coverage or remove too many winners.
success_criteria: Shortlist of true-overlay candidates promoted for lockbox testing exists.

stages.title: True overlay lockbox test against base @1
stages.objective: Run surviving true-overlay candidates on the frozen lockbox window against base @1 to obtain a definitive verdict on whether microstructure works as a true overlay.
actions: For each surviving true-overlay candidate, run on the same lockbox window: base @1 alone, base @1 + short-only overlay, base @1 + long-only overlay, base @1 + combined overlay.
Compute per run: trades, PnL, PF, DD, win rate, removed trades, removed winners, removed losers, ownership of improvement.
success_criteria: Final verdict on true-overlay track obtained: confirmed, weak, or rejected.

stages.title: Honest replacement track vs base @1
stages.objective: If overlay is weak or impossible, test microstructure as an honest replacement signal layer — a new snapshot compared head-to-head against base @1, with no overlay claims.
actions: Build separate replacement snapshots: short-only, long-only, combined.
For each, document: exact signal logic, threshold logic, difference from base, explicit declaration of no overlay claim.
Run all replacement variants against base @1 on the same lockbox window.
success_criteria: Final verdict on replacement track obtained: confirmed, weak, or rejected.
stages.gate_hint: Replacement track can proceed in parallel with overlay track (stages 4-6) once stages 2 and 3 are complete, but should be deprioritized if overlay track succeeds.

stages.title: Cannibalization, ownership and regime analysis
stages.objective: Audit all surviving variants for cannibalization: whether improvement comes from removing bad trades or damaging profitable clusters, and identify regime-dependent behavior.
actions: For all surviving variants from overlay and replacement tracks compute: removed losers share, removed winners share, PnL of removed trades.
Identify: strongest improved regime, weakest affected regime, weak-window repair, profitable cluster damage, side asymmetry.
Answer whether improvement stems from removing bad trades or from wholesale signal coverage change.
Check whether important regimes are degraded.
success_criteria: Ownership/cannibalization map exists for all viable variants.

stages.title: Does model layer add anything?
stages.objective: Determine whether ML models (logistic, small CatBoost) provide meaningful improvement over simple microstructure rules, using fixed windows and labels without wide HPO.
actions: For the best surviving route, compare: simple bucket rule, threshold rule, logistic baseline, small CatBoost.
Compare only on fixed windows and fixed labels, no wide hyperparameter search.
success_criteria: Clear verdict: simple_rule_enough, model_adds_value, or model_not_worth_complexity.

stages.title: Optional gate: early-cut or directional scout
stages.objective: Conditionally unlock at most one follow-on branch only if v12 has already confirmed a route — early-cut for confirmed overlay, or directional scout for confirmed replacement.
actions: Evaluate early-cut gate condition: true overlay confirmed or strong watchlist with early post-entry micro behavior visible.
Evaluate directional scout gate condition: replacement confirmed or strong watchlist with monotonicity and regime coherence.
Open at most one branch if conditions met; lock both if neither is met.
success_criteria: Lock/unlock decision for further development is documented.
stages.gate_hint: Early-cut opens only if true overlay confirmed with recognizable early post-entry micro behavior. Directional scout opens only if replacement confirmed with monotonic regime coherence and entry-timing signal. Maximum one branch opened.

stages.title: Final verdict on v12
stages.objective: Classify the microstructure route into one of four honest terminal statuses and record the final decision with clear next steps.
actions: Aggregate evidence from all overlay, replacement, cannibalization, and model assessment stages.
Assign one of: CONFIRMED TRUE OVERLAY, CONFIRMED REPLACEMENT, WATCHLIST, or REJECTED.
Record final route classification and next step in research_record.
success_criteria: Final route classification assigned with documented rationale and clear next step.

warnings: v11 result was downgraded to watchlist; v10 result was mischaracterized as model-based veto overlay but was actually a rule-based microstructure replacement candidate.
Thresholds -0.155 and 0.164 from v11 appear hand-tuned without documented provenance.
